sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — The Recurring Revenue Machine
required_elements: SaaS value chain position (horizontal platform, vertical SaaS, infrastructure, application layer)
Product classification (system of record, system of engagement, point solution)
Founder technical depth vs. go-to-market orientation assessment
Insider ownership concentration and equity compensation burn rate tracking

sections.title: Unit Economics Deep Dive — The Metrics That Actually Matter
required_elements: Net Revenue Retention (NRR) with decomposition (gross retention + expansion)
CAC payback period analysis (fully-loaded CAC / gross-margin-adjusted ACV)
LTV/CAC ratio calculation (gross margin × ACV × customer lifespan / CAC)
Rule of 40 decomposition (growth + FCF margin) with directional trend
Magic Number (net new ARR / prior-quarter S&M spend)
Gross margin trend analysis and comparison to sector median

sections.title: Competitive & Ecosystem Mapping
required_elements: Competitive dynamic assessment (differentiation, price, distribution, platform ecosystem)
Vendor consolidation risk analysis (are customers reducing SaaS vendor count?)
Platform risk assessment (distribution platform disintermediation risk)
AI disruption vector analysis (which features are LLM-replaceable?)
AI value driver vs. defensive positioning assessment

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: EV/Revenue valuation framework (high-growth, negative-earnings SaaS)
EV/Gross Profit normalization for margin differences
Growth-adjusted multiple analysis
Path to Rule of 40 optimization modeling
Transition to EV/FCF or P/E for mature SaaS (sub-25% growth)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: ARR growth vs. revenue recognition divergence (deferred revenue drawdown)
Billings growth decelerating faster than ARR (elongating sales cycles)
NRR expansion vs. new logo acquisition divergence (growth source shifting)
SBC as % of revenue increasing while growth decelerates (dilution signal)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: SaaS-specific investigation tracks (expert network calls, customer reference checks, G2/Gartner peer reviews)
Three high-value investigation tracks with specific data sources and hypotheses

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Value chain position clearly identified (horizontal vs. vertical, layer classification)
Product classification documented (system of record/engagement/point solution)
NRR decomposed into gross retention and expansion components
CAC payback period calculated and compared to sector median (~18 months)
LTV/CAC ratio computed with health threshold (>3x healthy, <2x warning)
Rule of 40 score decomposed showing growth and margin components with trend direction
Magic Number calculated and compared to segment leaders
Gross margin calculated with peer comparison
Competitive positioning assessed across differentiation, price, distribution dimensions
Consolidation risk analyzed (are customers actively reducing vendors?)
AI disruption threats specifically enumerated (which features vulnerable to LLM replacement?)
Rule of 40 path to profitability modeled with timing and opex leverage assumptions
Investigation tracks include specific expert network focuses, customer references, and analyst coverage
